allow: PowerShell($r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/ -MaximumRedirection 0 -SkipHttpErrorCheck -UseBasicParsing; "root: $\($r1.StatusCode\) -> $\($r1.Headers.Location\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/login -UseBasicParsing; "login: $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/api/me -SkipHttpErrorCheck -UseBasicParsing; "api/me: $\($r3.StatusCode\) $\($r3.Content\)"; $r4 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/api/auth/steam -MaximumRedirection 0 -SkipHttpErrorCheck -UseBasicParsing; "auth/steam: $\($r4.StatusCode\) -> $\($r4.Headers.Location\)")
